name: Capitol Punishment (Chili)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, add Paprika, Oregano, MSG, chili powder, Cumin, Beef bouillon, Beer and 2 cups Water. Let simmer.
2. In a separate skillet, brown meat in 1 lb or 1 1/2 lb batches with Wesson Oil or suet. Drain and add to the simmering spices. Continue until all meat is done.
3. Saute chopped onions and garlic in 1 Tbsp. Oil or suet. Add to the spice and meat mixture.
4. Add Water as needed. Simmer for 2 hours.
5. Add Mole, Sugar, Coriander seed, hot sauce and Tomato Sauce. Simmer for 45 minutes.
6. Dissolve masa harina flour in warm Water to form a paste. Add to chili. Add Salt to taste. Simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
7. Add additional Louisiana Hot Sauce for hotter taste.
